info.title: ChangeMind API
info.description: ASP.NET Core 10.0 API following Clean Architecture principles. Provides endpoints for fitness coaching, training programs, and personal health management.

post.description: Create a new user account with email and password. Returns JWT tokens (auto-login). Profile details (name, age, etc.) should be completed via PATCH /api/users/{id}/complete-profile.
Authenticate user with email and password. Returns JWT access token and refresh token.

get.description: Retrieve paginated list of users. Supports filtering by active status.

post.description: Create a new user account. No authentication required.

get.description: Retrieve users awaiting coach assignment. Typically for coach role.

delete.description: Deactivate user account (soft delete - sets IsActive to false)

post.summary: Complete user profile with fitness info
post.description: Fill in detailed fitness profile after registration

get.summary: Check if user profile is completed
get.description: Returns whether the user's profile has been completed (includes personal and fitness information). Only the user can check their own profile completion status.

schema.description: True if profile is completed, false otherwise

401.description: Unauthorized - missing or invalid authentication token

403.description: Forbidden - user can only check their own profile completion

get.description: Aggregate view: coach summary, assigned user count, active program count, pending waiting-user count (global), recent active programs (last 5), and per-user `HasTrainingProgram` / `HasNutritionPlan` breakdown.

403.description: Forbidden — coach can only view own dashboard

get.description: Aggregate view: profile, active training program, active nutrition plan, and waiting status (with `hasTrainingProgram` / `hasNutritionPlan` flags). Users may only query their own dashboard; Coach and Admin may query any user.

403.description: Forbidden — users can only view their own dashboard

get.summary: List active training programs of a coach (Admin or owning Coach)
get.description: Returns all active training programs where CoachId matches and IsActive=true, joined with assigned user fitness profile (age, height, weight, gender). Admin can query any coachId; Coach can query only their own.

403.description: Forbidden — Coach can only view own programs; User role cannot access

get.description: Returns all fitness goals (active and inactive). No authentication required.

post.summary: Create a new fitness goal (Coach or Admin only)

409.description: Fitness goal with same name already exists

put.summary: Update a fitness goal (Coach or Admin only)

delete.summary: Soft delete a fitness goal (Coach or Admin only)

get.description: Returns a sorted list of all unique muscle groups present in the active exercise library. No authentication required.

parameters.name: muscleGroup
parameters.description: Filter by muscle group (e.g., Chest, Back, Legs)

parameters.name: difficultyLevel
parameters.description: Filter by difficulty (e.g., Beginner, Intermediate, Advanced)

post.description: Coaches create training programs for users. Requires JWT authentication.

get.summary: Get active training program for user
get.description: Retrieve the currently active training program assigned to a user

404.description: No active program found for user

put.description: Set weekly exercise schedule for training program

post.summary: Create a new workout session (own user only)
post.description: Persists a workout session as a single row whose JSON column captures all exercise/set/weight/reps data. The authenticated user can only create sessions for themselves.

403.description: Forbidden — cannot log session for a different user

get.summary: Get last N workout sessions for a user + day key (own user only)
get.description: Returns the user's most recent workout sessions for the given day (e.g. 'Day-3'). The JSON exercise/set data is deserialized into nested fields for easy consumption by the FE.

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Maximum number of sessions to return (default 4, max 50)

200.description: Sessions retrieved successfully (ordered by RecordDate DESC)

403.description: Forbidden — users can only view their own sessions

get.summary: List all users waiting for coach assignment (Coach or Admin only)
get.description: Returns users where IsWaitingForAssignment=true (at least one of training program or nutrition plan is still missing). Each item exposes `hasTrainingProgram` and `hasNutritionPlan` so the FE can show **which** program is missing and disable the corresponding write action when already assigned. Uses the `bulk-list` request timeout policy.

200.description: Waiting users retrieved successfully. Each entry includes `hasTrainingProgram` and `hasNutritionPlan` flags — coach should only POST to the program endpoint(s) whose flag is `false`.

mixed.summary: Two users: one needs both programs, one already has training

403.description: Forbidden — coach or admin role required

get.summary: Get waiting status for a specific user
get.description: Users can only query their own status. Coaches and admins may query any user.

403.description: Forbidden — users can only query their own status

404.description: No waiting record found for user

get.summary: List active foods (grams or piece based)
get.description:
Returns all active foods. The `unit` field on each item determines how macros are stored and how a meal item must reference this food:
- `unit = "Grams"` → macros are populated in `*Per100g` fields; `MealItemInput.grams` is required.
- `unit = "Piece"` → macros are populated in `*PerPiece` fields and `pieceLabel` describes one serving (e.g. "1 adet", "1 dilim", "1 avuç (~25g)"). `gramsPerPiece` is an informational reference weight. `MealItemInput.pieces` is required.

The FE should branch its quantity input UI on `unit` and use the corresponding macro group when displaying nutrition data.

200.description: Foods retrieved successfully. Each item is either grams-based or piece-based — never both.

mixed.summary: One grams-based food (chicken) and one piece-based food (egg)

post.summary: Create a new food (Coach or Admin only)
post.description:
Creates a food entry. The `unit` field decides which macro group is required:
- `unit="Grams"` → `caloriesPer100g`, `proteinPer100g`, `carbsPer100g`, `fatPer100g` required; piece fields must be omitted.
- `unit="Piece"` → `caloriesPerPiece`, `proteinPerPiece`, `carbsPerPiece`, `fatPerPiece`, `pieceLabel` required (`gramsPerPiece` optional); per100g fields must be omitted.

403.description: Forbidden — coach or admin role required

409.description: A food with the same name already exists

put.summary: Update a food (Coach or Admin only)
put.description: Same `unit`-conditional field rules as POST. Path `foodId` overrides the body's `foodId`.

409.description: Another food with this name already exists

delete.summary: Soft delete a food — sets IsActive=false (Coach or Admin only)

post.summary: Create a nutrition plan (Coach or Admin)
post.description: Creates a nutrition plan covering one or two day types (WorkoutDay and/or OffDay). Any previously active plan for the user is automatically deactivated (single-active rule).

403.description: Forbidden — coach or admin role required

get.description: Users can only view their own plan; coaches and admins can view any plan.

post.description: Activates the plan; any other active plans for the same user are deactivated.

get.summary: Get user's latest active nutrition plan
get.description: Returns the most recently created active plan for the user. Users may only query themselves; coaches and admins may query any user.

get.summary: List all nutrition plans (active + historical) for a user (Coach or Admin)

get.description: Retrieve payment details. Requires JWT authentication.

post.description: Process user payment for package purchase. Requires JWT authentication and Idempotency-Key header for deduplication.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Unique request identifier for idempotency (UUID). Same key returns cached result.

409.description: Conflict - Payment already in progress (try again after Retry-After)

refreshToken.description: Refresh token for obtaining new access token (7 days validity)

expiresIn.description: Access token expiry in seconds (900 = 15 minutes)

fitnessGoal.description: Fitness goal ID (UUID) to associate user with a fitness goal
Fitness goal ID (UUID) to associate user with a fitness goal
Fitness goal description (e.g., 'Lose weight and build endurance')

hasTrainingProgram.description: True if a training program has already been assigned. Coach should not write another.

hasNutritionPlan.description: True if a nutrition plan has already been assigned. Coach should not write another.

userId.description: User ID to assign program to

UpdateDailyProgramRequest.description: Set weekly exercise schedule. Key format: Day-1, Day-2, etc.

dailyExercises.description: Weekly schedule (Day-1, Day-2, etc.) with exercises

trainingProgramId.description: Optional reference to the training program this session belongs to

recordDate.description: Session date (UTC). Must not be in the future.

isWaitingForAssignment.description: true if either training or nutrition program is still missing

detail.example: One or more validation errors occurred.

errors.description: Validation errors indexed by field name or index

password: Password must be at least 8 characters

FoodDto.description: Food item. `unit` indicates which macro group is populated. For Grams-based foods, `*Per100g` fields are set; for Piece-based foods, `*PerPiece` + `pieceLabel` are set.

unit.description: Measurement basis: Grams (per 100g) or Piece (per adet).

pieceLabel.description: Localized label for one piece (UI hint).

gramsPerPiece.description: Reference weight of one piece in grams (informational only).

packageProgress.description: Active package window + progress percentage. Null if user has no active (non-expired) completed payment.

PackageProgressDto.description: Time-based progress for an active package purchase. `progressPercentage` is `(now - startDate) / (endDate - startDate) * 100`, clamped to 0..100.

totalDays.description: Whole days in the package window.

CreateFoodRequest.description:
Conditional fields based on `unit`:
- Grams: `caloriesPer100g`, `proteinPer100g`, `carbsPer100g`, `fatPer100g` required; piece fields must be omitted.
- Piece: `caloriesPerPiece`, `proteinPerPiece`, `carbsPerPiece`, `fatPerPiece`, `pieceLabel` required (`gramsPerPiece` optional); per-100g fields must be omitted.

UpdateFoodRequest.description: Same shape as CreateFoodRequest. The path parameter `foodId` identifies the record.

MealItemInput.description: Exactly one of `grams` or `pieces` must be positive, matching the referenced food's `unit`. Grams-based foods accept `grams` only; Piece-based foods accept `pieces` only.

grams.description: Quantity in grams. Required for Grams-based foods.

pieces.description: Quantity in pieces (adet). Required for Piece-based foods.

days.description: Dictionary keyed by NutritionDayType (WorkoutDay / OffDay). One or two entries required.

quantityUnit.description: Unit of the `quantity` field; 'g' for grams or 'adet' for pieces.

bearerAuth.description: JWT access token. Obtained from /api/auth/login endpoint. Token validity: 15 minutes. Use Idempotency-Key header with POST /api/payments for idempotent payment processing.

tags.name: Training Programs
tags.description: Training program management (coaches can create, users can view)

tags.name: Fitness Goals
tags.description: Fitness goal definitions — public list, coach/admin manage

tags.name: Waiting Users
tags.description: Coach assignment queue — list and query user waiting status

tags.name: Workout Sessions
tags.description: Per-user workout session logging — stores exercise/set/weight/reps as JSON for a given day
